label: PASS
rationale: After ACE_Set_Enabled is set to Anybody, the later unauthenticated Admin SP session can satisfy the ACE for setting the Enabled column, so SUCCESS is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The trajectory sets ACE_Set_Enabled BooleanExpr to Anybody; that ACE governs setting Authority Enabled, so rejecting the unauthenticated target as NOT_AUTHORIZED is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: ACE_Set_Enabled is personalized to Makers, but the target session has no MakerSymK or MakerPuK authentication, so the Makers class ACE is not satisfied and NOT_AUTHORIZED is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: With ACE_Set_Enabled changed to Makers, an Anybody-only session does not authenticate any member of Makers; allowing the Authority_Makers Enabled Set is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The target session starts successfully as MakerPuK, and MakerPuK is an individual member of the Makers class; the personalized Makers ACE is therefore satisfied, so SUCCESS is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The successful MakerPuK session authenticates a member of Makers, which authenticates the Makers class for ACE evaluation; NOT_AUTHORIZED is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The target session starts successfully as MakerSymK, and MakerSymK is an individual member of Makers; this satisfies the Makers ACE for setting Enabled, so SUCCESS is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: A successful MakerSymK session authenticates the Makers class under the class-membership rule, so the Makers ACE should authorize the target Set; NOT_AUTHORIZED is not compliant.
